title: shay's bug dyes 🐞
description: Replaces dyes with whimsical pixelated bugs! Each bug is lovingly inspired by its real-world counterpart.
body:
![A display of each dye, and the bug it was assigned.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c7f40e5e1d79515130cca853dfea3233d18eca5.png)
**Replaces dyes with whimsical pixelated bugs!** Each bug is lovingly inspired by its real-world counterpart. 

I was inspired to create this resource pack after learning about cochineal dye, a real-life dye made from dried insects. Though the bugs featured here aren't actually used for dyes, I thought the concept would be cute, especially because I love bugs.

Version 1 includes 9 bug dyes, with more planned for future updates! Feel free to share your thoughts, report issues, suggest new bugs, or recommend minecraft version ports in the comments.
